name: 1'6"x2'6" Cavendish Canary Rectangular Outdoor Door Mat - Threshold™
description:
Protect your floors and add a tropical feel to your entryway with this Cavendish Canary Rectangular Outdoor Door Mat from Threshold™. Made from 100% coir, this rectangular doormat helps clear dirt and debris from shoes, while the latex backing prevents it from sliding. This medium-pile doormat features colorful leaves print that pops against the blue backdrop for a welcoming look, and you can simply shake it to clean.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
